description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On March 29, 2025, a Pony.ai autonomous vehicle (AV), while driving eastbound on Trestle Glen Road in Oakland, CA, made contact with 
the side mirror of a parked passenger vehicle. The Pony.ai AV was in manual mode. Following the incident, the safety operator drove the 
vehicle to Pony.ai’s Fremont office. There were no injuries reported, the police were not called. Pony.ai was not able to locate the owner of 
the vehicle and left contact information.
Print
Clear Form
